summary_en: 82.0M shares (3.04% S/O) | ¥50.0B upper limit | Market purchase via discretionary trading agreement | May 21–Sept 30, 2026 | All acquired shares to be cancelled post-completion
title_en: Notice of Determination of Treasury Share Acquisition and Cancellation of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: On 14 May 2026, ENEOS Holdings' board of directors resolved to acquire and subsequently cancel treasury shares under the Companies Act. The company will acquire up to 82.0 million ordinary shares (3.04% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥50.0 billion during the period 21 May 2026 to 30 September 2026. The acquisition will be executed via a discretionary trading agreement for open-market purchases. The board cited the company's capital allocation policy targeting a total return ratio of 50% or more (on net income excluding inventory impacts) during the fourth medium-term business plan period (fiscal 2025–2027), combined with the objective of further improving capital efficiency. All acquired shares are intended to be cancelled, with the specific cancellation details and effective date to be resolved by the board upon completion of the acquisition.
